data.name: My Landlord is a Futanari
data.detailed_description:
Futa on Male

Rent is due, and having recently been laid off, you seem to have found yourself in quite the pickle.

Luckily your landlord is an older lady, who has taken a particular liking to you. Perhaps you can come to some kind of an arrangement?

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

Kinetic Visual Novel

H-Scenes
~5K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
